overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant neon-lit night market adorned with red paper lanterns, transitioning through open plazas with industrial architecture, and ascending multiple stairways between levels of a dense futuristic urban environment filled with holographic advertisements and cherry blossom trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with red paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered market arcade lined with food stalls and red paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking away from camera toward the plaza exit

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns hanging in rows from the ceiling
blue and green market stalls with vendors
large structural concrete pillars supporting the roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered market walkway illuminated by hanging red paper lanterns. The camera moves forward past food stalls and concrete pillars, with scattered pedestrians visible in the moderate crowd. The environment is sheltered with artificial lighting and a concrete sidewalk surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with industrial pipes and stairway

events.description: exits covered market arcade into open plaza with large industrial pipes visible
begins ascending wide concrete stairway with red railings

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza and then ascending a wide concrete stairway alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive yellow industrial ventilation pipes rising vertically
wide concrete stairs with red painted railings leading upward
illuminated advertisement poster for Free Circus showing a character on motorcycle
black and orange striped bollards lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered market into an open plaza featuring massive industrial pipes and security bollards. After crossing the plaza, the character begins ascending a wide concrete stairway around 18 seconds, passing a digital billboard for 'Free Circus' on the left while following other pedestrians upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with illuminated cherry trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza level among crowds of pedestrians, passing illuminated cherry blossom trees and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gold jacket and purple skirt walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: trees with pink illuminated blossoms lining the plaza
floating holographic displays and large digital billboards on buildings
bright purple and blue neon signs on building facades
small vendor carts with blue and yellow coloring

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a wide elevated plaza filled with illuminated cherry blossom trees and vibrant holographic advertisements. The camera moves through a moderate crowd of pedestrians past food carts and neon signage, maintaining a steady walking pace through the cyberpunk streetscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with massage parlor and stairway

events.description: begins ascending final narrow stairway to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking past the massage parlor and vending machines before ascending a final narrow stairway with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: building with large red neon sign reading MASSAGE PARLOR
blue and yellow automated vending machine with illuminated display
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
narrow concrete stairway with red railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrower commercial corridor featuring a prominent red neon Massage Parlor sign. The camera passes vending machines and graffiti-covered walls before beginning a final ascent up a narrow stairway at 60 seconds, leaving the open plaza behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon market through an industrial plaza and up into a vibrant, elevated urban district. It begins within a covered walkway illuminated by hanging red paper lanterns, moving past food stalls and concrete pillars amidst a moderate crowd. As the camera exits the shelter, the environment opens into a wide plaza dominated by massive industrial pipes and security bollards before turning upward along a wide concrete stairway past a digital billboard. The scene then expands into a bright elevated plaza filled with glowing cherry blossom trees and holographic advertisements, where the camera weaves through pedestrians and neon signage. Finally, the path narrows into a commercial corridor featuring graffiti-covered walls and a red neon massage parlor sign before ascending a final narrow stairway.
